value.reason: The cited page is from "Antigravity 2.0" — an unrecognized, non-Google product — not from any official Google AI/agent platform documentation. While the page does describe a "Plugins" feature that closely matches the cell's label and description, it cannot be treated as documentation of a shipped Google capability. The page explicitly situates itself under "Antigravity 2.0 > Customizations > Plugins," which is not a Google product or brand. Because the page does not document this capability as a shipped feature of a real Google provider, documents_capability is false, and consequently label_ok and description_ok cannot be confirmed either.
